'''âj-r-n-l''' ('''kajarneloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:eroticise|eroticise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-r-n-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eroticise|eroticise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-r-n-l
|-
! Lemma
| kajarneloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijarneloko|thijarneloko]] || [[word:jijarneloko|jijarneloko]] || [[word:shijarneloko|shijarneloko]] || [[word:kijarneloko|kijarneloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujarneloko|thuthujarneloko]] || [[word:jujujarneloko|jujujarneloko]] || [[word:shushujarneloko|shushujarneloko]] || [[word:kukujarneloko|kukujarneloko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojarneloko|thojarneloko]] || [[word:jojarneloko|jojarneloko]] || [[word:shojarneloko|shojarneloko]] || [[word:kojarneloko|kojarneloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjarneloko|thĂŠjarneloko]] || [[word:jĂŠjarneloko|jĂŠjarneloko]] || [[word:shĂŠjarneloko|shĂŠjarneloko]] || [[word:kĂŠjarneloko|kĂŠjarneloko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajarneloko|thajarneloko]] || [[word:jajarneloko|jajarneloko]] || [[word:shajarneloko|shajarneloko]] || [[word:kajarneloko|kajarneloko]]

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
